description: A signing key the trust bundle recognizes and has delegated authority to sign platform-train/stable's own index entries attempts to sign an entry for a different channel (relay-channel/stable) it holds no delegation for -- even though the key is validly recognized and the two channels are operationally related (a platform-train channel and the independent relay channel), the mismatched channel MUST be rejected exactly as an unrecognized key would be: delegation is scoped per channel, never inherited by naming similarity or relatedness.
